name: Mexican Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, onion, garlic, and peppers in a 4-cup microwavable casserole.
2. Microwave uncovered at High for 2 - 3 minutes or until softened.
3. Blend in flour and microwave at High for 30 seconds.
4. Gradually whisk in milk until smooth.
5. Add tomatoes; microwave, covered at High for 3-5 minutes or until mixture comes to a boil and thickens, whisking once.
6. Stir in cheese until melted. Serve warm with tortilla chips or veggies. Makes 2 cups.
